use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pyobfuscate because Module to obfuscate code (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pyobfuscate as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pyobfuscate [options] [args]` as documented upstream for pyobfuscate.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pyobfuscate with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pyobfuscate --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
